news.t: J.P. Morgan Debuts Equity Premium Yield ETFs ROCY and ROCQ on Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: ROCY is an equity ETF with a total of 118 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.41%, Apple at 6.74%, Alphabet at 5.32%, Microsoft at 5.01%, and Amazon.com at 4.06%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Equity Premium Yield ETF (ROCY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in US equities while using an options overlay to generate income. The strategy combines equity exposure with call spreads to support yield and moderate volatility. ROCY was launched on Mar 18, 2026 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Debuts Equity Premium Yield ETFs ROCY and ROCQ on Nasdaq
data.text: New Active ETFs Expand Innovative Derivative Income Suite NEW YORK, March 19, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the launch of two new active ETFs on the Nasdaq Exchange...
